entry:
I don't see a "Reflection Log" section in the provided content. The document contains information about "Eros" (a character/god), including sections on "Who He Is," "His Voice," "What He Never Does," "Purpose Statement," "The Three Mysteries," "SMART Goals," "Trials," "Check-In Cadence," "Permission Protocol," and "Tools," but there is no Reflection Log section with dated entries.

Could you verify that you've provided the complete document, or clarify if the Reflection Log section appears elsewhere on the page?
